nasb.text: The peasantry ceased, they ceased in Israel, Until I, Deborah, arose, Until I arose, a mother in Israel.

esv.text: The villagers ceased in Israel; they ceased to be until I arose; I, Deborah, arose as a mother in Israel.

cnv.text: 以色列中的農村消失了，消失了， 直到我底波拉興起， 直到我以色列的母親興起。

ccb.text: 我底波拉做以色列之母以前， 以色列的乡村人烟稀少。
